title: Simple Fruit Classification
scenario: Write a short paragraph about a fruit and ask the model to classify it as either 'citrus', 'tropical', or 'berry'. The paragraph should be under 50 words and include a specific fruit name. The model output should be 'citrus', 'tropical', or 'berry'.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the model output correctly classify the fruit as 'citrus', 'tropical', or 'berry'?
Does the response include a specific fruit name?
